title: Bug when reading verilog with -mem2reg option

features.name: mem2reg transformation on function with unpacked arrays
features.description: Code should include a function with unpacked array declarations that will be processed by the -mem2reg pass

features.name: unpacked array with parameter-derived bounds
features.description: Code should include unpacked array declarations where array size depends on module parameters that could evaluate to invalid values

features.name: YosysVerilog output with mem2reg
features.description: Code should include a design intended for Yosys processing with -mem2reg flag and -b verilog output format
